name: BoidsMovement

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Move as part of a flock.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: BoidsMovement

eventsFunctions.name: MoveInDirection
eventsFunctions.description: Intend to move in a given direction.

eventsFunctions.name: MoveToPosition
eventsFunctions.description: Intend to move toward a position.

eventsFunctions.name: MoveToObject
eventsFunctions.description: Intend to move toward an object.

eventsFunctions.name: AvoidPosition
eventsFunctions.description: Intend to avoid an area with a given center and radius.

eventsFunctions.name: AvoidObject
eventsFunctions.description: Intend to avoid an area from an object center and a given radius.

eventsFunctions.name: Speed
eventsFunctions.description: Return the current speed.

eventsFunctions.name: VelocityX
eventsFunctions.description: Return the current horizontal speed.

eventsFunctions.name: VelocityY
eventsFunctions.description: Return the current vertical  speed.

eventsFunctions.name: ShouldRotate
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the object is rotated while moving on its path.

eventsFunctions.name: MaxSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Return the maximum speed.

eventsFunctions.name: SetMaxSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Change the maximum speed of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: MaxAcceleration
eventsFunctions.description: Return the maximum acceleration.

eventsFunctions.name: SetMaxAcceleration
eventsFunctions.description: Change the maximum acceleration of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: CohesionRadius
eventsFunctions.description: Return the cohesion sight radius.

eventsFunctions.name: SetCohesionRadius
eventsFunctions.description: Change the cohesion sight radius.

eventsFunctions.name: AlignmentRadius
eventsFunctions.description: Return the alignment sight radius.

eventsFunctions.name: SetAlignmentRadius
eventsFunctions.description: Return the alignment sight radius.

eventsFunctions.name: SeparationRadius
eventsFunctions.description: Return the separation sight radius.

eventsFunctions.name: SetSeparationRadius
eventsFunctions.description: Return the separation sight radius.

eventsFunctions.name: CohesionWeight
eventsFunctions.description: Return which weight the cohesion takes in the chosen direction.

eventsFunctions.name: SetCohesionWeight
eventsFunctions.description: Change the weight the cohesion takes in the chosen direction.

eventsFunctions.name: AlignmentWeight
eventsFunctions.description: Return which weight the alignment takes in the chosen direction.

eventsFunctions.name: SetAlignmentWeight
eventsFunctions.description: Change the weight the alignment takes in the chosen direction.

eventsFunctions.name: SeparationWeight
eventsFunctions.description: Return which weight the separation takes in the chosen direction.

eventsFunctions.name: SetSeparationWeight
eventsFunctions.description: Change the weight the separation takes in the chosen direction.

description:
Simulates swarms or flocks movement following the separation, alignment, cohesion principles. The flock can be attracted to a location or avoid some obstacles.

The [Fish School example](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?project=example://fish-school) shows how properties impact on the movement.
